lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: La cocina está lista para cocinar.
lines.en: The kitchen is ready for cooking.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Perfecto, la cocina se ve muy limpia.
lines.en: Perfect, the kitchen looks very clean.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá says the kitchen is ready. Choose the best response.

choices.text: Perfecto, la cocina se ve muy limpia.
choices.feedback: Great fit. You stayed on topic and responded naturally.

choices.text: Sí, quiero sentarme en la silla.
choices.feedback: Understandable Spanish, but it shifts away from the kitchen setup.

choices.text: No, la casa está debajo del pan.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this kitchen prompt.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: En la cocina, todo tiene su lugar.
lines.en: In the kitchen, everything has its place.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Sí, así cocinamos más rápido.
lines.en: Yes, that way we cook faster.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá talks about kitchen organization. Choose a natural reply.

choices.text: Sí, así cocinamos más rápido.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Practical and natural.

choices.text: No me importa el orden.
choices.feedback: Understandable, but less cooperative in this context.

choices.text: La cocina está dentro del pan.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this conversation.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: ¿Quieres pan con la comida?
lines.en: Do you want bread with the meal?

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Sí, un poco de pan, por favor.
lines.en: Yes, a little bread, please.

responseExercise.prompt: You are offered bread at the table. Pick a natural response.

choices.text: Sí, un poco de pan, por favor.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Polite and natural for this family meal moment.

choices.text: No, gracias.
choices.feedback: Understandable and polite, but less aligned with accepting the offer.

choices.text: El vaso está en la puerta.
choices.feedback: Off-target for the bread offer prompt.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: El pan está caliente, cuidado.
lines.en: The bread is hot, careful.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Perfecto, tomo un pedazo pequeño.
lines.en: Perfect, I will take a small piece.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá warns that the bread is hot. Choose a natural response.

choices.text: Perfecto, tomo un pedazo pequeño.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Natural and safe reaction.

choices.text: No importa, lo tomo rápido.
choices.feedback: Understandable Spanish, but less careful for this moment.

choices.text: El pan está en la sal y canta.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this warning.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: Pon el plato en la mesa.
lines.en: Put the plate on the table.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Claro, pongo un plato para cada persona.
lines.en: Of course, I will set one plate for each person.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá asks you to place the plate on the table. Choose a helpful reply.

choices.text: Claro, pongo un plato para cada persona.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Helpful and natural in a family mealtime setting.

choices.text: Ahora no, tal vez después.
choices.feedback: Understandable Spanish, but less cooperative for this moment.

choices.text: El plato está debajo del vaso y canta.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this table setup prompt.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: Falta un plato para Ana.
lines.en: One plate for Ana is missing.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Ahora mismo pongo otro plato.
lines.en: I will put another plate right now.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá says Ana still needs a plate. Pick a natural response.

choices.text: Ahora mismo pongo otro plato.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Quick and helpful.

choices.text: Que coma sin plato hoy.
choices.feedback: Understandable Spanish, but not appropriate in this family setting.

choices.text: El plato está en la puerta del vaso.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this request.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Necesito un vaso de agua.
lines.en: I need a glass of water.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: Aquí tienes un vaso limpio.
lines.en: Here is a clean glass.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá gives you a clean glass. What is a natural response?

choices.text: Gracias, ahora me sirvo agua.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Polite and practical for this kitchen moment.

choices.text: Sí, está bien.
choices.feedback: Understandable, but less complete and warm than a fuller response.

choices.text: La sal duerme en el vaso.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this exchange.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: El vaso está al lado del plato.
lines.en: The glass is next to the plate.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Gracias, lo pongo en mi lugar.
lines.en: Thanks, I will place it in my spot.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá points out where the glass is. Choose a natural reply.

choices.text: Gracias, lo pongo en mi lugar.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Practical and polite.

choices.text: No necesito el vaso ahora.
choices.feedback: Understandable, but less aligned with the setup moment.

choices.text: El vaso está dentro del pan.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this table setup.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: La sal está al lado del pan.
lines.en: The salt is next to the bread.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Perfecto, pásame la sal, por favor.
lines.en: Perfect, pass me the salt, please.

responseExercise.prompt: You want to season your food. Pick a natural sentence with 'sal'.

choices.text: Perfecto, pásame la sal, por favor.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Natural and polite at the table.

choices.text: No necesito nada.
choices.feedback: Understandable, but it does not practice requesting salt.

choices.text: La cocina está dentro de la sal.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this mealtime request.

lines.speaker: Mamá
lines.es: Pon solo un poco de sal.
lines.en: Add only a little salt.

lines.speaker: Visitante
lines.es: Sí, solo un poco de sal.
lines.en: Yes, only a little salt.

responseExercise.prompt: Mamá tells you to use only a little salt. Pick a natural reply.

choices.text: Sí, solo un poco de sal.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Natural and clear.

choices.text: Prefiero mucha sal.
choices.feedback: Understandable, but less aligned with the suggestion.

choices.text: La sal cocina el plato y canta.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this cooking tip.
